title: Transcript:Burntmeat
wikitext:
{{Transcript|npc}}
{{Transcript list|Burntmeat|Wolfbone}}

==Standard dialogue==
===After Making Friends with My Arm and delivering fire notes===
* '''Burntmeat:''' Ah, you come back again.
* '''Wolfbone:''' How are things at Weiss?
* '''Player:''' Snowflake and My Arm are ruling the town together, and now I've built them a special fire, they can grow goutweed there.
* '''Wolfbone:''' I plan to stay here, in the Stronghold, with my friend Burntmeat, but it good to hear of my home. Thank you.
* '''Burntmeat:''' Stronghold trolls not all that interested in firemaking, after all, but t'anks for bringing book anyway. It taste lovely.
* '''Player:''' ... you're welcome.
* {{tact|end}}
